attributes.style: margin-bottom: 40px;
display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); padding-bottom: 8px;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 34px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); letter-spacing: -0.02em;
font-size: 11px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;

display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr auto auto; gap: 18px; padding: 14px 0px; border-top-width: medium; border-top-style: none; border-top-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: none; align-items: baseline;
font-size: 12px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 18px; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); font-weight: 500;
font-size: 11.5px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); font-style: italic;
font-size: 11.5px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126);
